title: Endertides
description: Enhance the End the way Mojang did in Dungeons, adding a new look to the End, along with more wildlife, items and more for you to uncover.
body:
![Endertides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b88ffa8a47c67f3da9c7af3b9633031554178e25.png)


Endertides is a Neoforge 1.21.1 mod (currently in early development stage, as i'm writing this, i developed this first version in just 2 days lol) that aims at making the most "Mojang accurate" end update possible, based on the additions they did to it themselves on Dungeons and also the latest concept of the End Update by Ulraf, so keeping it more of a wasteland, so i'm mixing some features from Dungeons' End with new concepts for a wasteland biome that has still to come to mind. For any suggestions, feel free to ask in my discord server, the goal is to make this mod a marvelous one and possibly one of the best most accurate end mods possible. (Little note: currently updating, so also remember to give feedback on the updates and say what you don't like or what could be improved, thank you!).

!!IMPORTANT NOTE!!
- Requires Geckolib

![Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7543b13b617b988d176197e369fcfb048471ed9d.png)
